ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the United States (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the state */,
  "median_age" TEXT /* Median age of the state's population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the salary data belongs to */,
  "starting_salary" TEXT /* Starting salary for the state */,
  "monthly_pay" TEXT /* Monthly pay for the state */,
  "weekly_pay" TEXT /* Weekly pay for the state */,
  "hourly_wage" TEXT /* Hourly wage for the state */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the salary data was recorded */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title for the salary data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the salary data (e.g., survey, government report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the economic indicator data belongs to */,
  "cost_of_living_index" TEXT /* Cost of living index for the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" TEXT /* Unemployment rate for the state */,
  "industry_trends" TEXT /* Industry trends for the state */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the economic indicator data was recorded */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of the state */,
  "poverty_rate" TEXT /* Poverty rate of the state */,
  "housing_cost" TEXT /* Average cost of housing in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salary data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the salary data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_salary_id FOREIGN KEY ("salary_id") REFERENCES salaries ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "report_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "export_data" TEXT /* Data included in the export */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data export was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the data export was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data export (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export_access" (
  "export_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export access event */,
  "export_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exported data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the exported data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the exported data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the exported data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_access_export_id FOREIGN KEY ("export_id") REFERENCES data_exports ("export_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical salary entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the historical salary data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the historical salary data applies to */,
  "starting_salary" TEXT /* Starting salary for the state in the given year */,
  "monthly_pay" TEXT /* Monthly pay for the state in the given year */,
  "weekly_pay" TEXT /* Weekly pay for the state in the given year */,
  "hourly_wage" TEXT /* Hourly wage for the state in the given year */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the historical salary data was recorded */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title for the historical salary data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical salary data (e.g., survey, government report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_data" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the industry data belongs to */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_trends" TEXT /* Trends and data for the industry in the state */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the industry data was recorded */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of the industry in the state */,
  "employment_rate" TEXT /* Employment rate in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
